about.description: the content object this assertion is about (widened in 2.0.0 to the nine new content kinds; widened in 4.0.0 to attitude, predicted_occurrence, and prediction_error, and to the cross_stratal_seam, whose absence here was a 3.0.0 drift repaired in this major version); about a non-causal object it means the source vouches for the vocabulary item

evidence_type.description: how the source came to the claim; ordering from strongest to weakest is intervention, observation, simulation, derivation, human_hint, imported (2.0.0 6.2)

strength.description: the source's estimate of causal strength (semantics.md rule 5); meaningful only when about references a Causal Relation Object

evidenced_by.description: the PARTICULAR token records that are the evidence for this claim (2.0.0 6.2). IDENTITY-BEARING.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the record's canonical identity-bearing bytes; excluded from the identity hash
